---
pagetitle: "Day 1 Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Day 1 Student Presenters
Monday, 25 May 2026 | 10:00 - 15:00 WIB  
@Auditorium, Faculty of Biology, UGM
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}

<div id="schedule-table"></div>

<script type="text/javascript">
var GROUPS = [
  {"group":"IUP 1","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"WBC Numeration Using Image Recognition","members":[{"name":"Salvana"},{"name":"Rizal"},{"name":"Sebayang"},{"name":"Risqa"}],"github":""},
  {"group":"IUP 2","theme":"Bioinformatika Medis / Klinis","title":"Network pharmacology of Alzheimer's disease and molecular docking of targeted proteins","members":[{"name":"Arista"},{"name":"Faizal"},{"name":"Shainna"}],"github":""},
  {"group":"Kelompok 1","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Identification of Cancer Associated Fibroblast-Related Genes to Prognosis and Immune Microenvironment Characterization in Lung Adenocarcinoma","members":[{"name":"Surya Aqila Akbar"},{"name":"Mohammad Naufal Halqi"},{"name":"Dian Ayu Kristianto"},{"name":"Mohammad Ilman Faizal"},{"name":"Muhammad Alif Rahman"}],"github":"https://github.com/MuhammadAlifRahman/CAFs-Lung-Adenocarcinoma"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 2","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"CausalAI-Pathway: A Novel Causal Inference Framework for Deciphering Non-Coding RNA Regulatory Pathways in Breast Cancer","members":[{"name":"Muhammad Rayhan Fajar"},{"name":"Farel Aditya Nurbaity"},{"name":"Nurwahid Mardhiya"},{"name":"Daffa Aulia Rahman"},{"name":"Aulia Ina Sholihah"}],"github":"https://github.com/mrfjr23/CausalAI-Pathway"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 3","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Deep Learning for Predicting Gene Expression from Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Data","members":[{"name":"Muhammad Akbar"},{"name":"Fulanah"},{"name":"Nurul Fajriyah"},{"name":"Rizal"}],"github":"https://github.com/akbarbio/deep-gene-expression"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 4","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Multi-Omics Integration for Cancer Subtype Classification","members":[{"name":"Ahmad Rizki"},{"name":"Siti Nurhaliza"},{"name":"Budi Santoso"},{"name":"Dewi Lestari"},{"name":"Eko Prasetyo"}],"github":"https://github.com/ekopras/multi-omics-cancer"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 5","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Genomic Analysis of Drug Resistance in Malaria Parasites","members":[{"name":"Andi Pratama"},{"name":"Rina Wulandari"},{"name":"Fajar Nugroho"},{"name":"Maya Sari"},{"name":"Hendra Gunawan"}],"github":"https://github.com/hendragunawan/malaria-resistance"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 6","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"AI-Powered Protein Structure Prediction for Enzyme Engineering","members":[{"name":"Rahmat Hidayat"},{"name":"Lina Marlina"},{"name":"Agus Setiawan"},{"name":"Putri Rahayu"},{"name":"Dimas Ardiansyah"}],"github":"https://github.com/dimasard/protein-ai"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 7","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Metagenomic Analysis of Gut Microbiome in Diabetes Patients","members":[{"name":"Indra Wijaya"},{"name":"Ratna Dewi"},{"name":"Bayu Setiawan"},{"name":"Nisa Rahmawati"},{"name":"Rizal Maulana"}],"github":"https://github.com/rizalmaulana/gut-microbiome-diabetes"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 8","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Phylogenetic Analysis of Indonesian Endemic Plant Species Using Chloroplast Genomes","members":[{"name":"Sari Indah"},{"name":"Bambang Sutrisno"},{"name":"Dina Kartika"},{"name":"Faisal Rahman"},{"name":"Gita Permata"}],"github":"https://github.com/gitapermata/indonesian-phylogeny"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 9","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Variant Calling Pipeline for Rare Disease Diagnosis","members":[{"name":"Taufik Hidayat"},{"name":"Ayu Lestari"},{"name":"Rendi Saputra"},{"name":"Dewi Sartika"},{"name":"Yoga Pratama"}],"github":"https://github.com/yogapratama/rare-disease-variant"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 10","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Machine Learning Classification of Plant Disease from Leaf Images Using Convolutional Neural Networks","members":[{"name":"Putri Handayani"},{"name":"Ahmad Fauzi"},{"name":"Siti Aminah"},{"name":"Rizki Ramadhan"},{"name":"Dian Saputra"}],"github":"https://github.com/diansaputra/plant-disease-cnn"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 11","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Single-Cell RNA Sequencing Analysis of Tumor Microenvironment in Colorectal Cancer","members":[{"name":"Rina Astuti"},{"name":"Budi Wijaya"},{"name":"Maya Fitri"},{"name":"Eko Saputra"},{"name":"Dewi Lestari"}],"github":"https://github.com/mayafitri/scRNA-colorectal"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 12","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"CRISPR Off-Target Prediction Using Deep Learning","members":[{"name":"Andi Prasetyo"},{"name":"Siti Nurhaliza"},{"name":"Rizal Abdullah"},{"name":"Putri Wulandari"},{"name":"Fajar Setiawan"}],"github":"https://github.com/rizalabd/crispr-predict"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 13","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Genome-Wide Association Study for Rice Drought Tolerance","members":[{"name":"Hendra Wijaya"},{"name":"Rina Sari"},{"name":"Bayu Prasetyo"},{"name":"Dewi Handayani"},{"name":"Agus Setiawan"}],"github":"https://github.com/hendrawijaya/rice-gwas"},
  {"group":"Kelompok 14","theme":"Machine Learning & Big Data dalam Biologi","title":"Metabolomic Profiling of Indonesian Traditional Medicinal Plants","members":[{"name":"Sari Dewi"},{"name":"Rizal Pratama"},{"name":"Lina Astuti"},{"name":"Fajar Wijaya"},{"name":"Maya Sari"}],"github":"https://github.com/mayasari/metabolomic-herbal"}
];

var t = 600;
function fmtTime(mins) {
  var h = String(Math.floor(mins / 60)).padStart(2, "0");
  var m = String(mins % 60).padStart(2, "0");
  return h + ":" + m;
}

var html = '<table class="table table-striped table-hover schedule-table">';
html += '<thead><tr><th>Time</th><th>Group</th><th>Theme</th><th>Title</th><th>Members</th><th>GitHub</th></tr></thead>';
html += '<tbody>';

GROUPS.forEach(function(g) {
  var start = fmtTime(t);
  t += 15;
  var end = fmtTime(t);
  var title = g.title ? g.title.trim() : "(No title)";
  var theme = g.theme ? g.theme.trim() : "";
  var members = g.members ? g.members.map(function(m) { return m.name; }).join(", ") : "";
  var github = g.github ? g.github.trim() : "";
  html += '<tr>';
  html += '<td>' + start + ' - ' + end + '</td>';
  html += '<td>' + g.group + '</td>';
  html += '<td><em>' + theme + '</em></td>';
  html += '<td>' + title + '</td>';
  html += '<td>' + members + '</td>';
  if (github) {
    html += '<td><a href="' + github + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Link</a></td>';
  } else {
    html += '<td></td>';
  }
  html += '</tr>';
});

html += '</tbody></table>';
document.getElementById('schedule-table').innerHTML = html;
</script>

<style>
.schedule-table th {
  background: #2c3e50;
  color: white;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.schedule-table td {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.schedule-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f8f9fa;
}
.schedule-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #e9ecef;
}
.schedule-table td:first-child {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #2c3e50;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(2) {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #34495e;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(3) {
  color: #7f8c8d;
  font-style: italic;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(4) {
  max-width: 400px;
}
.schedule-table td:nth-child(5) {
  max-width: 300px;
  color: #555;
}
</style>

:::
:::
